enriched_points.expanded_content: Reactive distillation integrates reaction and separation in a single vessel, enhancing efficiency. A medium-scale pilot plant was systematically designed using advanced multivariable control strategies.
The implementation led to significant improvements in yield and purity of products, showcasing the potential of reactive distillation to optimize industrial chemical processes effectively.
Key lessons include the importance of optimizing operating conditions and the benefits of integrating real-time control systems for enhanced process performance and stability.
